overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Spider-Man video game showing the character in a blue and white suit walking through a wet urban New York City street. The character moves from the sidewalk into traffic, crosses an intersection, and enters a narrow alleyway between brick apartment buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential city sidewalk with benches and trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk past pedestrians and park benches

notable_agents.action: man in brown coat walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: red brick residential building with fire escapes and stoops
red brick building facade with windows facing the street
metal park bench with people sitting on it
mature deciduous trees with green foliage lining the sidewalk
large black garbage bags piled on the sidewalk curb

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet city sidewalk lined with red brick apartment buildings. Pedestrians walk in the opposite direction, and a park bench sits on the right. Black trash bags are piled near the curb, and mature trees provide partial shade over the concrete pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with mixed vehicle traffic

events.description: character steps off the sidewalk and begins walking in the street between parked and moving vehicles
large white delivery truck passes closely on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking down the middle of the wet asphalt street, navigating between parked cars and moving traffic

notable_agents.action: large delivery truck moving slowly past the character in the same direction

entered.detail: white box truck with red and blue logo on the side
bright yellow NYC taxi cab with rooftop advertisement
white four-door sedan parked along the curb

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the sidewalk into the street, walking between lanes of traffic. A large delivery truck passes on the right, while yellow taxis and other vehicles navigate the wet road. The brick buildings recede into the background as the character proceeds down the asphalt street.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with traffic signals and crosswalk

events.description: approaches intersection and stops at red traffic light waiting to cross
light turns green and character crosses the street at the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection, waiting for the traffic signal, then crossing the street with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: police sedan waiting at the intersection with emergency lights off

entered.detail: overhead traffic signal showing red then green
white painted zebra crossing lines on the asphalt
white NYPD police sedan with blue stripes parked at the intersection
large white commercial truck waiting at the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a sunlit urban intersection with a traffic light and crosswalk. After waiting for the signal to change, the character crosses the street alongside other pedestrians. A police car waits at the corner, and a large white box truck is visible on the left side of the intersection.

events.description: turns left off the main street into a narrow alley between tall brick buildings

agents.ego_description: turning left into the alleyway and continuing to walk away from the main street into the enclosed space

entered.detail: tall red brick wall of adjacent building with fire escapes
tall red brick wall creating a narrow corridor
stone tile pavement with patches of grass growing between cracks
building facade visible at the end of the alleyway

segments.scene_description: The character turns left into a narrow, enclosed alleyway between tall brick buildings. The space is sheltered from direct sunlight, with stone pavement underfoot and patches of grass along the walls. The alley is empty of pedestrians and vehicles, creating a quiet corridor away from the busy street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling, wet city sidewalk into the secluded quiet of a narrow urban alleyway. It begins by tracking the character past red brick apartment buildings and pedestrians on a shaded concrete pavement lined with trash bags and park benches. As the character moves from the sidewalk into the street, the perspective shifts to navigate between lanes of traffic and passing delivery trucks on the wet asphalt. The scene then opens into a sunlit intersection where the character crosses a crosswalk alongside other pedestrians and waiting vehicles before turning left. Finally, the camera follows the character into a sheltered, enclosed alleyway between tall brick walls, leaving the noise of the city for a quiet corridor of stone and patches of grass.
